# RHC Solutions

> RHC Solutions is an enterprise IT consulting and managed services provider operating since 1994. Specialties: cloud infrastructure, cyber security, business continuity, professional services, and fractional CIO/CISO leadership.

## Company snapshot
- Founded: 1994 (30+ years in business)
- Tagline: "We Just Do IT"
- Areas: IT consulting, cloud (AWS / Azure / GCP), cyber security, business continuity, virtual office support, project management
- Audience: SMB to mid-market enterprises seeking outsourced or fractional IT leadership

## Canonical site
- https://rhcsolutions.com/ — Homepage; service overview, stats, contact CTA

## Primary pages
- https://rhcsolutions.com/about-us — Company history, leadership, methodology
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services — Top-level catalog of all service lines
- https://rhcsolutions.com/contact — Contact form, office locations, contact methods (email, phone, Telegram, WhatsApp)
- https://rhcsolutions.com/careers — Open roles, benefits, culture
- https://rhcsolutions.com/clients — Selected client logos and case-study teasers
- https://rhcsolutions.com/partners — Technology partners and reseller relationships

## Service pages
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/it-consulting — Strategy, roadmaps, vendor selection, due-diligence
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/professional-services — Project delivery, integration, custom engagements
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/cio-as-a-service — Fractional CIO leadership and governance
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/ciso-as-a-service — Fractional CISO leadership, risk and compliance posture
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/cloud-infrastructure — AWS / Azure / GCP architecture, migration, optimization
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/cyber-security — Endpoint, network, identity, incident response
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/virtual-office — Modern workplace, M365, collaboration, identity
- https://rhcsolutions.com/services/business-continuity — Backup, disaster recovery, resilience planning

## Careers detail pages
- https://rhcsolutions.com/careers/competitive-compensation — Compensation philosophy
- https://rhcsolutions.com/careers/continuous-learning — Learning and certification support
- https://rhcsolutions.com/careers/global-team — Distributed team model
- https://rhcsolutions.com/careers/work-life-balance — Schedule and flexibility

## Legal
- https://rhcsolutions.com/privacy — Privacy policy
- https://rhcsolutions.com/terms — Terms of service
- https://rhcsolutions.com/cookies — Cookie policy

## Contact
- Web form: https://rhcsolutions.com/contact
- Booking link (30-min strategy call): linked from header "Book a Meeting" CTA

## Machine-readable resources
- Sitemap: https://rhcsolutions.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://rhcsolutions.com/robots.txt
- Organization schema (JSON-LD) is emitted on every page
